patches.rationale: READ-VERIFY at decider-2026-05-18T05-20 confirms all 4 WIN-033.c5 holes already patched: n→28.8 is now n(r)≈2.84; 4% closer is now 97% of the way / 20% disc_radius; 6,000yr reconciled to 12,000yr; Alpha Centauri is ~2 L☉ combined. No action needed.

patches.find: Beyond the small-sample failure, AIC/BIC penalties are derived asymptotically: they quantify expected loss when the chosen model is applied to new data drawn from the same distribution. When the model excludes a slice of its prospective domain by stipulation (OPEN-015, cities within ±12°), that out-of-sample regime never arrives, and the asymptotic justification for the complexity penalty has no purchase.
patches.replace: Beyond the small-sample failure, AIC/BIC penalties are derived asymptotically and quantify expected loss when the chosen model is applied to new data from the same distribution; at n = 6 the asymptotic regime is reached for neither V13 nor the WGS84 model it is compared against.
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon c5 hole 1 (minor): removes OPEN-015 entanglement from AIC/BIC asymptotic sentence. The entanglement blurred two distinct statistical arguments (small-sample unreliability vs. out-of-distribution domain restriction). Replacement uses the cleaner framing recommended by curmudgeon: both models fail the asymptotic premise, making information-criterion adjudication unreliable on its own terms.

patches.find: 2k(k + 1)/(n − k − 1) = 40 penalty units — an arithmetic signal
patches.replace: 2k(k + 1)/(n − k − 1) = 40 penalty units (and is one step from being mathematically undefined — AICc diverges at n = k + 1) — an arithmetic signal
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon c5 hole 2 (minor): adds the AICc edge-of-definability parenthetical. At n=k+2=6 with k=4, AICc denominator (n-k-1)=1, one step from diverging. The addition sharpens the statistical argument without altering the verdict.
